hero.title: Your math diagrams: simpler, faster, clearer.
hero.narrative: There are plenty of ready-made materials online, but finding the right one takes time. With MathOnCanvas you build exactly what your lesson needs: your own world of visual mathematics.

sync: Language switcher synchronized with editor toolbar.

features.easy: Easy to learn with a clear, friendly interface.
features.export: Export to PDF without quality loss.
features.customize: Wide range of customization options for elements.

highlightsSubtitle: Tools that keep handouts readable and printable at any scale.

symbols.title: Math symbols in text
symbols.description: A dedicated palette inserts π, ≅, and other symbols directly into text with no code hunting.

pdf.title: PDF without quality loss
pdf.description: Print board posters and student cards from the same source. PDF stays sharp and easy to share.

pages.title: Multi-page documents
pages.description: Tasks and answers in one document; print only the pages you need.

visual.title: Visual formula editor
visual.description: No need to know LaTeX. Adjust style, rotate, and move formulas with instant feedback.

library.title: Formula library
library.description: Start with popular formulas and adapt them instead of starting from scratch.

geometry.title: Geometry
geometry.description: Lines, polygons, and angle markers: everything to build precise diagrams quickly.

footer: Built for math and geometry projects
